description: Provisional owner-level development-regression Truth for the first Active Tag to Retrieval pilot on pinned applications_app_samples code.

evaluation_boundary.rationale: All 48 cases and both legacy split labels were visible during candidate development, so they can freeze behavior but cannot provide independent activation evidence.

cross_target_tag_adjudications.rationale: The NetMonitor struct ReviewUnit directly owns NetMonitor.aboutToAppear, so lifecycle is a relevant secondary exact characteristic in addition to network and state management.
The Index struct ReviewUnit directly owns Index.aboutToAppear, so lifecycle is a relevant secondary exact characteristic alongside state management.
The PicturePreview struct ReviewUnit directly owns PicturePreview.aboutToAppear, so lifecycle is a relevant secondary exact characteristic alongside state management.
The HomePage struct ReviewUnit directly owns HomePage.aboutToAppear and HomePage.aboutToDisappear, so lifecycle is a relevant secondary exact characteristic alongside state management.
The VideoPlayView struct ReviewUnit directly owns VideoPlayView.aboutToDisappear, so lifecycle is a relevant secondary exact characteristic alongside state management and responsive behavior.
The ReviewUnit is the OperateRDBInTaskPool.aboutToAppear lifecycle method itself, so lifecycle is an exact characteristic in addition to its timer behavior.
The ReviewUnit is the Index.aboutToAppear lifecycle method itself, so lifecycle is an exact characteristic in addition to its timer behavior.
